title: Command Line Options
description:
Command Line Options

Command Line Options

There are command line options for EPSON RC+ 7.0 that provide the following functions:

			Start EPSON RC+ 7.0 for a specified project.
			Change the EPSON RC+ 7.0 startup mode without a dialog.
			Disable splash screen

Examples of command line options are:

			Command input from Windows Start menu | Run
			Target property of desktop shortcut
